findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "startOptimization" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Start a route optimization job with multiple addresses. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "checkOptimization" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check the status and results of a route optimization job. Returns the optimized route when complete. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "emailResults" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Email the optimized route results with navigation links to a specified email address. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.
